mock-hash-fs-123.summary: Mock summary for ucode fs. It handles file reads and writes.
mock-hash-fs-123.when_to_use: Use this when your script needs direct filesystem access on OpenWrt.

mock-hash-fs-789.summary: Mock summary for ucode fs (UPDATED). This handles atomic writes.
mock-hash-fs-789.when_to_use: Essential for reliable ucode filesystem operations.

mock-hash-xhr-456.summary: Mock summary for LuCI XHR. It provides AJAX capabilities.
mock-hash-xhr-456.when_to_use: Essential for creating dynamic web interfaces in LuCI.
